creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to webmaster from comment #2)
> > Are you using FreeBSD?
> > If so, more information will be needed;
> > uname -a
> I have this bug on all three servers, this three server use FreeBSD 10.1.
> 
> FreeBSD kalimdor 10.1-RELEASE-p24 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p24 #0: Mon Nov  2
> 12:17:28 UTC 2015    
> root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
> 
> > svn info /usr/ports
> I use portsnap.
Which unpacks everything into /usr/ports, so that you can build your
ports from source. :)
So anyone who wants to assist you, will be grateful if they had the
revision of your source tree:
svn info /usr/ports
will provide that info. :)
> 
> > What version of portmaster are you using?
> Version 3.17.7
> 
> > Was it built from your ports tree, or did you use pkg to install it?
> All ports are builded from the ports tree.
